title: Under The Cherry Trees
description: Adds red version of cherry trees, branches and tree hollow
body:
Adds Red Cherry Trees. They re-use regular logs, so there's only 2 new blocks - sapling and leaves.

Adds Cherry Hollow: a small 3 by 3 container.

All blocks can only be obtained in creative. 

Made for Modfest 26 (in under one hour!)
